Collab with this loser named Z or something...

Kind of a weird time for me to post but oh well it had to be posted so 😜

We had a lot of ideas, here was one of Z's:

I said no but anyways.

How was this idea born? It's a weird combination between Markiplier and this one girl on a rock. I will not be elaborating further. Maybe Z will in their caption cause idk what they've written yet 😭

I've had to suffer through a lot of verbal abuse throughout this entire process and Z and I's marriage may never be the same 💔

I blame stormie for like about half of this...

moving on,

PSTAR SATORU!!!! And photographer {{user}} cause hell yeah. If you guys want the reversed roles, Z has it on their profile + it's linked in the bot recommendation 😜

Y'all are going to be getting quite a few Sylus bots after this. You actually wouldn't believe how many problems that man caused today 😭

I finally got his new card I'm crying from multiple areas I'm so happy.

(P.S. - apparently curious cat is gonna be shut down pretty soon, so I've made a TELLONYM to replace it, link in bio! It'll be in the captions soon too)

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,
